title: Cooperació per a la innovació. Resultats dels Grups Operatius 2016
subtitle: Sector Ramader i Forestal
description: A report on the 2016 Operational Groups under the Cooperation for Innovation scheme within the Rural Development Programme of Catalonia, focused on the livestock and forestry sector. It details the development and testing of tools and technologies for optimizing joint management of livestock manure to enhance fertilization, improve crop quality, and protect the environment.
